description:
Visual merge and diff tool from Perforce - P4Merge - lets you visualize the differences between file versions. Color coding makes it easy to resolve conflicts that result from parallel or concurrent development.

      NOTE: Automatic uninstall procedure is included in this package, so you don't need to manually reverse whatever actions installer did.
      NOTE: Phrase « Devbox » in a name of this package is used as signature to indicate high quality standards. Functionally, the package is the same as any other Chocolatey package.
summary: P4Merge: Visual Merge Tool. Provides graphical three-way merging and side-by-side file comparisons.
author: Perforce Software Inc.
